'''Hynla''' was an elderly [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] and head of the [[CarsinShare]] corporation. He had taken interest in gladiatorial [[Death/Legends|death]] matches as a sporting way for his company to demonstrate its superiority on [[Nonsu]]. Hylna had also developed an appreciation for the scent of [[Blood/Legends|blood]].<ref name="CCW" />

{{Char-stub}}
